extract: The Dreamyard (Japanese: 夢の跡地 Dream Ruins) is the overgrown ruins of an abandoned research facility in southeast Unova. It is connected to Striaton City in the west. It is home to a Munna and Musharna. In Pokémon Black and White, the player encounters some Team Plasma Grunts here who are kicking a Munna to get its Dream Mist. Cut is required to access the building area. After beating Ghetsis and N, the orange traffic cone is removed. This allows access to the basement and the other portion of the area, where Gorm of the Seven Sages can be found and arrested.
